note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 new-engine source (core-macros.js:303-337 → droll.js:58-107). The legacy SPACE form {{roll d6}} and the {{roll:1d6}} single-colon form both resolve to a droll roll. Dice are random, so the value here is a FROZEN placeholder (4) — under the assembly-only oracle a real capture pins a seeded value; RPT uses an injectable RNG in tests. Prose RPT-authored + scrambled. rptAdapter unwired (issues 11-15).

input.description: Main block rolls a d6 via the legacy space form; frozen placeholder value 4.
